events.title: Latest enhancements for Copilot security, management, and analytics
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot のセキュリティ・管理・分析機能を強化
events.titleEn: Latest enhancements for Copilot security, management, and analytics
events.summary:
As Copilot becomes a daily workflow for more teams, IT and security leaders need clear, practical controls to deploy and manage confidently—without slowing down adoption or compromising governance.
Let's take a closer look at the new enhancements providing built-in security, man...

events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot can edit your document in PowerPoint
events.titleJa: PowerPoint で Copilot による文書編集に対応
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot can edit your document in PowerPoint
events.summary: Copilot in PowerPoint lets you create, edit, and refine presentations through natural conversation, directly in your presentation. You can start a new presentation or build on an existing one, asking Copilot to generate slides, update content, improve layouts, and polish design—while preserving formatting, structure,...

events.title: Microsoft Viva: Unlocking Deeper Copilot Insights with Enhanced Power BI Filtering
events.titleJa: Power BI フィルタリング強化で Copilot インサイトを拡充
events.titleEn: Microsoft Viva: Unlocking Deeper Copilot Insights with Enhanced Power BI Filtering
events.summary: Enable Global and Insights admins to turn on additional attributes as filters in Power BI reports, including reserved attributes and your organization’s custom attributes. Users who have access to Power BI reports can then use these newly enabled filters to tailor reports to their business needs.
events.summaryJa: Enable Global and Insights admins to turn on additional attributes as filters in Power BI reports, including reserved attributes and your organization’s custom attributes. Users who have access to Power BI reports can then use these newly enabled filters to tailor reports to the...

Users who have access to Power BI reports can then use these newly enabled filters to tailor reports to their business needs.

events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Critique in Researcher
events.titleJa: Researcher に Critique 機能を追加
events.summary: Responses are generated by GPT and Claude working together, with GPT drafting an initial response and Claude reviewing for increased response accuracy, completeness, and citation integrity.
events.summaryJa: Responses are generated by GPT and Claude working together, with GPT drafting an initial response and Claude reviewing for increased response accuracy, completeness, and citation integrity.
events.summaryEn: Responses are generated by GPT and Claude working together, with GPT drafting an initial response and Claude reviewing for increased response accuracy, completeness, and citation integrity.

events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Researcher Council
events.summary: Council in Researcher runs multiple leading AI models from different providers in parallel in one place, so you can quickly compare outputs and see consensus vs. conflict) to make high-stakes decisions with greater confidence—without switching tools.
events.summaryJa: Council in Researcher runs multiple leading AI models from different providers in parallel in one place, so you can quickly compare outputs and see consensus vs. conflict) to make high-stakes decisions with greater confidence—without switching tools.

events.title: Microsoft Viva: New Overview experience and agent categories in Agent Dashboard
events.titleJa: Agent Dashboard の overview と agent categories を刷新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Viva: New Overview experience and agent categories in Agent Dashboard
events.summary: Customers can now view and understand their agent landscape through the new Overview page that will be included as part of the Agent Dashboard in Microsoft Viva. This experience will provide customers with key at-a-glance insights on adoption in their organizations, visibility into who’s creating agents used in their...

events.title: Outlook: Copilot Search Suggestions for Outlook
events.titleJa: Outlook の Copilot 検索候補を強化
events.titleEn: Outlook: Copilot Search Suggestions for Outlook
events.summary: Get Copilot suggestions in the Outlook search menu to help you stay on top of your inbox and calendar, find what you are looking for and get more done in Outlook.
events.summaryJa: Get Copilot suggestions in the Outlook search menu to help you stay on top of your inbox and calendar, find what you are looking for and get more done in Outlook.
events.summaryEn: Get Copilot suggestions in the Outlook search menu to help you stay on top of your inbox and calendar, find what you are looking for and get more done in Outlook.
events.importanceReason: 今後の展開計画や事前準備に影響するため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため

events.title: Microsoft Teams: Attendee capacity packs for Teams events
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Teams: Attendee capacity packs for Teams events
events.summary: Attendee capacity packs provide increased capacity limits for Teams events. Organizers can scale event attendance beyond base limits while maintaining a consistent Teams events experience.
events.summaryJa: Attendee capacity packs provide increased capacity limits for Teams events. Organizers can scale event attendance beyond base limits while maintaining a consistent Teams events experience.
events.summaryEn: Attendee capacity packs provide increased capacity limits for Teams events. Organizers can scale event attendance beyond base limits while maintaining a consistent Teams events experience.
events.importanceReason: コスト配分や予算管理の見直しに直結するため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため

events.title: Copilot adoption report updated with streamlined UX and power user insights [Web]
events.titleJa: 効率化された UX とパワー ユーザーの洞察を反映して更新された Copilot 導入レポート [Web]
events.titleEn: Copilot adoption report updated with streamlined UX and power user insights [Web]
events.summary: The updated Copilot adoption Power BI report introduces a cleaner experience and new insights that help organizations understand how power users engage with Copilot.
events.summaryJa: 最新の Copilot 導入 Power BI レポートでは、よりクリーンなエクスペリエンスと、パワー ユーザーが Copilot にどのように関与しているかを組織が理解するのに役立つ新しい洞察が導入されています。
events.summaryEn: The updated Copilot adoption Power BI report introduces a cleaner experience and new insights that help organizations understand how power users engage with Copilot.
events.importanceReason: 更新まとめや公式リリース整理として追いやすいため / ライセンス評価や定着施策の精度が上がるため

events.title: Code interpreter now works on files found via Chat search
events.titleJa: コードインタープリタは、チャット検索で見つかったファイルに対して動作するようになりました。
events.titleEn: Code interpreter now works on files found via Chat search
events.summary: Analyze enterprise search results with code interpreter Copilot’s code interpreter can now analyze files found via enterprise search in Chat, even if they weren’t manually uploaded or linked.
events.summaryJa: コード インタープリタを使用したエンタープライズ サーチ結果の分析 Copilot のコード インタープリタは、手動でアップロードまたはリンクされていない場合でも、Chat のエンタープライズ サーチで見つかったファイルを分析できるようになりました。
events.summaryEn: Analyze enterprise search results with code interpreter Copilot’s code interpreter can now analyze files found via enterprise search in Chat, even if they weren’t manually uploaded or linked.
events.importanceReason: 更新まとめや公式リリース整理として追いやすいため / エージェント構築や品質管理に関わるため

events.title: Share OneDrive files with a Copilot-generated summary in Windows [Windows]
events.titleJa: Windows で OneDrive ファイルを Copilot が生成した概要と共有する [Windows]
events.titleEn: Share OneDrive files with a Copilot-generated summary in Windows [Windows]
events.summary: You can now generate a file summary with Copilot and include it directly when sharing OneDrive files in Windows.
events.summaryJa: Copilot を使用してファイルの概要を生成し、Windows で OneDrive ファイルを共有するときにそれを直接含めることができるようになりました。
events.summaryEn: You can now generate a file summary with Copilot and include it directly when sharing OneDrive files in Windows.
events.importanceReason: 更新まとめや公式リリース整理として追いやすいため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため

events.title: Microsoft Teams: Video recap in Teams
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Teams: Video recap in Teams
events.summary: Intelligent meeting recap will now include video-based recaps. Video recap creates narrated video highlights from recorded meetings, featuring key takeaways and short clips that showcase important moments.
events.summaryJa: Intelligent meeting recap will now include video-based recaps. Video recap creates narrated video highlights from recorded meetings, featuring key takeaways and short clips that showcase important moments.
events.summaryEn: Intelligent meeting recap will now include video-based recaps. Video recap creates narrated video highlights from recorded meetings, featuring key takeaways and short clips that showcase important moments.
events.importanceReason: 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため / 会議やコミュニケーションの業務導線に直結するため

events.title: Outlook: Copilot Chat available in shared and delegate mailboxes
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Outlook: Copilot Chat available in shared and delegate mailboxes
events.summary: Shared mailbox users and delegates with Read and manage (full access), and/or mail folder-level permission will now be able to access Copilot Chat directly from their shared and delegate mailboxes in new Outlook.
events.summaryJa: Shared mailbox users and delegates with Read and manage (full access), and/or mail folder-level permission will now be able to access Copilot Chat directly from their shared and delegate mailboxes in new Outlook.
events.summaryEn: Shared mailbox users and delegates with Read and manage (full access), and/or mail folder-level permission will now be able to access Copilot Chat directly from their shared and delegate mailboxes in new Outlook.
events.importanceReason: 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため / 会議やコミュニケーションの業務導線に直結するため

events.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat available in Teams chats, channels, and meetings [Windows, Mac, Web]
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat が Teams のチャット、チャネル、会議で利用可能 [Windows、Mac、Web]
events.titleEn: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat available in Teams chats, channels, and meetings [Windows, Mac, Web]
events.summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat integration is expanding to Teams chats, channels, and meetings, with mobile support coming soon.
events.summaryJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat の統合は、Teams のチャット、チャネル、会議に拡張されており、モバイル サポートも近々提供される予定です。
events.summaryEn: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat integration is expanding to Teams chats, channels, and meetings, with mobile support coming soon.
events.importanceReason: 更新まとめや公式リリース整理として追いやすいため / 外部サービス連携や拡張性に影響するため

events.title: Smarter answers with embedded image understanding [Windows]
events.titleJa: 埋め込み画像の理解によるよりスマートな回答 [Windows]
events.titleEn: Smarter answers with embedded image understanding [Windows]
events.summary: Declarative Agents can now interpret and ground responses using embedded images in Word, PowerPoint, and PDF files. This enhancement enables Copilot to extract insights from charts, diagrams, and screenshots, improving the accuracy and completeness of answers.
events.summaryJa: 宣言型エージェントは、Word、PowerPoint、PDF ファイルに埋め込まれた画像を使用して応答を解釈し、根拠を示すことができるようになりました。この機能強化により、Copilot はチャート、図、スクリーンショットから洞察を抽出できるようになり、回答の精度と完全性が向上しました。
events.summaryEn: Declarative Agents can now interpret and ground responses using embedded images in Word, PowerPoint, and PDF files. This enhancement enables Copilot to extract insights from charts, diagrams, and screenshots, improving the accuracy and completeness of answers.
events.importanceReason: 更新まとめや公式リリース整理として追いやすいため / 文書や資料作成の体験変化が大きいため

events.title: Edit scheduled prompts for Copilot [Windows, Mac, Web]
events.titleJa: Copilot のスケジュールされたプロンプトを編集する [Windows、Mac、Web]
events.titleEn: Edit scheduled prompts for Copilot [Windows, Mac, Web]
events.summary: Users can now edit the schedule of their Copilot prompts, giving them more flexibility and control.
events.summaryJa: ユーザーは、Copilot プロンプトのスケジュールを編集できるようになり、より柔軟に制御できるようになりました。
events.summaryEn: Users can now edit the schedule of their Copilot prompts, giving them more flexibility and control.
events.importanceReason: 更新まとめや公式リリース整理として追いやすいため / 会議やコミュニケーションの業務導線に直結するため

events.title: Fewer confirmation prompts for Copilot actions [Web]
events.titleJa: Copilot アクションの確認プロンプトが減少しました [Web]
events.titleEn: Fewer confirmation prompts for Copilot actions [Web]
events.summary: Action confirmations have been streamlined, so users experience fewer interruptions while still maintaining safety controls.
events.summaryJa: アクションの確認が合理化されたため、ユーザーは安全制御を維持しながら中断が少なくなります。
events.summaryEn: Action confirmations have been streamlined, so users experience fewer interruptions while still maintaining safety controls.
events.importanceReason: 更新まとめや公式リリース整理として追いやすいため / 日常利用時の体験変化が大きいため
